summary: List Project Inspection Template Item Reference
description: Returns a collection of References for a specified Project Inspection Template.

parameters.name: inspection_template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Project Inspection Template

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return References with the specified IDs

parameters.name: filters[item_id]
parameters.description: Return Reference(s) with the specified Item IDs and Synced Company Template Item References

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort item(s) by the chosen param; check below for a list of options. The direction of sorting is ascending by default; for descending sort, insert the - symbol before the param.

schema.description: Array of Project Inspection Template Item References

template_id.description: ID of the associated Project Inspection Template

item_id.description: ID of the associated Project Inspection Template Item

payload.description: Contains specific attributes depending on the type of Reference

type.description: Project Inspection Template Item Reference Type

created_at.description: Time the Project Inspection Template Item Reference was created

updated_at.description: Time the Project Inspection Template Item Reference was updated
